## Summary

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm run format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm run lint`
- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm run build`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm run action:build`
- [ ] `pnpm run scan:fixtures`

## Release Safety

- [ ] No package publish
- [ ] No production release
- [ ] No registry upload
- [ ] No marketplace publish
